name: alpha_601_quality5_rev4_subind
expr: group_neutralize(add(multiply(rank(add(add(ts_zscore(ts_backfill(divide(ebit, assets), 252), 252), ts_zscore(ts_backfill(divide(cashflow_op, assets), 252), 252)), add(ts_zscore(ts_backfill(divide(subtract(ts_backfill(fnd6_cptmfmq_saleq, 252), ts_backfill(cogs, 252)), ts_backfill(fnd6_cptmfmq_saleq, 252)), 252), 252), add(ts_zscore(ts_backfill(divide(ts_backfill(fnd6_cptmfmq_saleq, 252), assets), 252), 252), reverse(ts_zscore(ts_backfill(divide(subtract(ebit, cashflow_op), assets), 252), 252)))))), 0.78), multiply(rank(reverse(ts_mean(returns, 4))), 0.22)), subindustry)

expr: trade_when(rank(add(add(ts_zscore(ts_backfill(divide(subtract(cashflow_op, capex), assets), 252), 252), reverse(ts_zscore(ts_backfill(divide(subtract(ebit, cashflow_op), assets), 252), 252))), ts_zscore(ts_backfill(divide(subtract(ts_backfill(fnd6_cptmfmq_saleq, 252), ts_backfill(cogs, 252)), assets), 252), 252))) > 0.64, group_neutralize(rank(reverse(ts_mean(returns, 6))), subindustry), rank(add(add(ts_zscore(ts_backfill(divide(subtract(cashflow_op, capex), assets), 252), 252), reverse(ts_zscore(ts_backfill(divide(subtract(ebit, cashflow_op), assets), 252), 252))), ts_zscore(ts_backfill(divide(subtract(ts_backfill(fnd6_cptmfmq_saleq, 252), ts_backfill(cogs, 252)), assets), 252), 252))) < 0.46)

name: alpha_607_market_neu_quality_rev3
expr: add(multiply(group_neutralize(rank(add(add(ts_zscore(ts_backfill(divide(ebit, assets), 252), 252), ts_zscore(ts_backfill(divide(cashflow_op, assets), 252), 252)), add(ts_zscore(ts_backfill(divide(subtract(ts_backfill(fnd6_cptmfmq_saleq, 252), ts_backfill(cogs, 252)), assets), 252), 252), reverse(ts_zscore(ts_backfill(divide(debt, assets), 252), 252))))), industry), 0.8), multiply(group_neutralize(rank(reverse(ts_mean(returns, 3))), industry), 0.2))
